title: Browser Origins, CORS, CSRF, Cookies, and Security Fields · Go Semantics Case: Cors Allowlist Preflight
summary: A browser API reflects arbitrary Origin with credentials, mutates state on GET, accepts ambient cookies cross-site, caches preflight incorrectly, and treats CORS as server authorization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo cors allowlist preflight increment in browser request trust and cross-origin policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Validate exact origins, methods, requested headers, credential mode, exposed headers, max age, Vary, null origin, and rejection behavior.
Distinguish origin, site, same-origin policy, CORS read permission, preflight, credentials, and server authorization.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
